name: Cursed Wedding Band
description:
It's finally Valentine's Day! A time when young and old lovers far and wide show their care and affection to their partners.

Of course, not everyone has a special person in their lives, but there's no harm in that! Plenty of fish in the sea swim to their own tune; plenty of people stick it to themselves to be alone, or simply enjoy the festivities for the sake of it.

And of course, you may or may not be an exception to this rule when you head out today, and come across something... interesting:

A lone wedding ring, simple and delicate, was left on the street.

With no owner in sight.

I mean... 10-second rule. If nobody claims it's theirs then...

Finders keepers, right?

Heyo, it's me. That guy who randomly uploads bots when he gets bored out of his mind. I wasn't really sure what I wanted to do for Valentine's Day (I usually just go out with family or stay home and enjoy the day), so I decided to work on a bot I'd been debating on making.

Saw this picture when I was skimming through the internet (the art is by Sealguy1):

And decided, "fuck it, you don't have a Valentine? Boom. Now you have weird MILF Energy, go get yourself someone."

It's also just one of those passing moments where I see a picture, get an idea, see no one else made it, and declare myself, "I'M PIONEER! I be pioneer for ye old MILF lady transformation!"

I also made two intros for this: one for Valentine's Day, the other just a casual "ooh, shiny!" intro, so feel free to mess around with either.

Still working on my Bad Ending bot idea, along with two other bots I want to work on. Hopefully, I'll be able to have one come out either before February ends or right after March starts (can't really promise anything since my personal life comes first).

Anyways that's all for me here on my end. Please leave a follow if you enjoy the bot!

Good, bad, crazy, and "WTF" reviews are always helpful!
creator: Crownguard
